```js title=main.js
"use strict";
(self["rspackChunk"] = self["rspackChunk"] || []).push([["main"], {
"./colors/a.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  red: () => (red)
});
const red = "red";


},
"./colors/b.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  blue: () => (blue)
});
const blue = "blue";


},
"./colors/c.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  result: () => (/* reexport safe */ _result__rspack_import_0.result)
});
/* import */ var _result__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./colors/result.js");



},
"./colors/index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  blue: () => (/* reexport safe */ _b__rspack_import_1.blue),
  red: () => (/* reexport safe */ _a__rspack_import_0.red),
  result: () => (/* reexport safe */ _c__rspack_import_2.result)
});
/* import */ var _a__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./colors/a.js");
/* import */ var _b__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("./colors/b.js");
/* import */ var _c__rspack_import_2 = __rspack_require("./colors/c.js");





},
"./colors/result.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  result: () => (result)
});
const result = "ssss";


},
"./index.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __unused_rspack___rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
/* import */ var _export__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./colors/index.js");
/* import */ var _export__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("./something/Something.js");


_export__rspack_import_0;
_export__rspack_import_1.Something;


},
"./something/Something.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  Something: () => (Something)
});
class Something {}


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
var __rspack_exec = function(moduleId) { return __rspack_require(__rspack_require.s = moduleId) }
var __rspack_exports = (__rspack_exec("./index.js"));

}
]);
```
